/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../Lib/Package/libInfra.a  CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/AutoBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/CAS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/File.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/IPAddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Infra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/MsgQue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/PacketBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/PoolAllocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Referable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Security.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Semaphore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Time.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Infra.dir/Source/Unicode.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../Lib/Package/libInfra.a
